pr.title: Non-record: Technique Taxonomy — Tier List, Interaction Effects, and BPB Verification Tools

output.summary: Curates a tiered taxonomy of Parameter Golf techniques plus interaction and verification tools to steer non-record submissions.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Normal research summary, no val-shard training reported.
techniques: Tier list with BPB deltas aggregated from merged PRs
Interaction matrix highlighting sub-additive technique combos
Verification checklist and parameter-budget tools for legal compliance
